chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI JCM No. 40 OF 2003 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of CMA No. 1666/2003. 2. For hearing of CMA No. 1667/2003. 3. For hearing of main petition. 25.02.2026. Mr. Muhammad Shahzaib, Advocate for the Petitioner. ********** Learned counsel for the Petitioner states that he is unable to contact with the Petitioner, which is why previous orders have not been complied with as yet. Since this matter has remained pending for over 22 years without any significant progress and even learned counsel present does not have instructions, therefore, this Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE AYAZ
